lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Evil Dave? What's he doing on the secret council?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: The council is meant to include one dark wizard, but obviously the other members did not want to include anyone who was a real threat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So how do I free him?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: To free Evil Dave you must make a stew, but it must be seasoned in a very particular way. The only way to find the recipe would be to ask someone who has tasted the stew.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But who could that be?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Remember that from the point of view of the outside world, anything you do in here has already happened. All the people here are out in the world, because from their point of view you have already rescued them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mean I need to talk to Evil Dave outside the time bubble?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Yes. He lives in Edgeville.

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: With his mother.

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: In her basement. I make no judgement about that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oooooookaaaaay....

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Remember, you need to make a particular stew for Evil Dave. Speak to him outside the time warp, because from his point of view out there you have already rescued him so he has already eaten the stew. He lives in

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Edgeville.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can we talk about what happened in the dining room?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Wow! You were incredible! The way you defeated the Culinaromancer, you made it seem so easy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... I don't suppose you can remember how I defeated him can you?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Of course! Which bit can't you remember doing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That fellow with the unhealthy obsession with black... Dave his name is...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't quite remember what I did to protect him...

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Oh yeah! I didn't understand that one myself, but apparently you went and asked him how he likes his stew, then made him remember it after he'd tasted it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh... what?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Yeah, I didn't understand it either, but you mentioned something about demonic incursions and evil cats too!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yeah... I remember now...

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Did you want a reminder on any other of your brave exploits?

lines.speaker: Doris
lines.text: Hello, dearie?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is Dave in?

lines.speaker: Doris
lines.text: Yes, he's just down in the cellar. Are you one of his evil friends?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'm evil!

lines.speaker: Doris
lines.text: Well, I hope the two of you have a good time. Try not to make too much mess.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I just want to talk to him.

lines.speaker: Doris
lines.text: Oh, that's good. He needs to spend time with more normal people. He hardly ever leaves that cellar, it can't be healthy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can Dave come out to play?

lines.speaker: Doris
lines.text: I know he's a grown man who lives in his mum's basement and hardly ever sees daylight, but there's no need to be nasty about it.

sections.title: Talking to Evil Dave again after getting him to tell you what he ate

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Welcome to my BASEMENT OF DOOM!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let me try to explain the time travel thing again...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You've got to tell me because the magic requires it!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: That's what you said before! Honestly, why make it more complicated than it needs to be?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Welcome to my BASEMENT OF DOOM!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nice basement!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Nice?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I mean, evil!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Yeah! I'm going to use it to summon DEMONS to DO MY BIDDING, or raise an ARMY OF THE UNDEAD! And then I'm going to totally, like, take over the world!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Ah-ha-ha-ha-ha-haa!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Weren't you going to give up evil?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Yeah, well...

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: I did try. I wore this bright red jumper and I got up in the morning and spent the day outside in the sunshine...

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: But I couldn't keep it up. I just didn't find anything good very interesting, you know?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Sometimes I worry about the consequences of evil. I don't really want anyone to get hurt, not like what happened with Denath.

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: But I can't not be evil! It's just who I am!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Ah-ha-ha-ha-ha-haa!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What did you eat at the secret council meeting?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Hey, the council meeting! They wanted me to be their evil representative! That proves I'm a great dark wizard! Right?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right...

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: But anyway, why do you want to know what I ate?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need to make that exact food in order to save you from the culinomancer's spell.

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: What? But that was last week! You've already saved me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sort of, it's complicated. It works like this...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Although you're here, you're also still in the time freeze.

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I mean, the whole room was frozen in time at the moment the culinomancer cast his spell, right?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: What? I didn't notice anything.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course you didn't! You were frozen!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: So how can I be there and also here? Which one is me?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: I mean, I feel like I'm me, but what if I'm not me?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: That would be terrible!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They're both you!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: How does that work?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: From YOUR point of view I've saved you, but from MINE I haven't.

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Well that's all right, as long as I'm saved from my point of view!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I have to save you, otherwise you won't be saved!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: But I'm here so you must already have saved me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's what I meant, from your point of view I've saved you but from mine I haven't!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've to take the food back in time to give it to you.

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Because otherwise you won't be saved from the culinomancer's spell.

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: But I was saved from the spell! I remember it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Exactly! That's why I know I have to go back and save you!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: What will happen if you don't?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't not, because I already have!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The fact that you're here means I already did save you, which means that you have to tell me the correct recipe. It's logically impossible for you not to!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: I don't understand this at all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There will be a temporal paradox and the universe will implode!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Oh no! That would be bad, and not even in an evil way!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Exactly! So you've got to tell me the recipe!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: But I still don't understand why you need the recipe when you've already saved me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know.

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: That's not very helpful. I don't even understand why you need the recipe anyway.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You've got to tell me because the magic requires it!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: All right! Now that makes perfect sense!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what was it?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: What was what?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The food you ate at the council meeting.

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: It was, like, this totally evil stew!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Evil stew? How was it evil?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Well, it kind of tasted evil, you know? You know, how you taste something and you think, that's really EVIL?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think you're mixing up 'good' and 'evil' again!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: What? Well, I'm evil, and I only like evil stuff, and I liked that, so it must be evil. Right?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose that makes some kind of sense. But I need to reproduce this stew, so can you describe it in more detail?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Well it tasted like the stews my mum makes. She puts these spices in them. But it was like she'd got the amounts totally right this time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'd better talk to your mum.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, never mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So have you had any luck with the demon-summoning?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Well, I thought I should start small, so I asked Wizard Grayzag for some help with summoning imps...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And did you manage to summon any?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Well, not imps, exactly. It turns out they're not the lowest form of demon after all. I got these hell-rats.

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: They're hardly evil at all! They're just like regular rats only they smell vaguely of sulphur!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See you later!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: If my ARMY OF DARKNESS doesn't get you first!

lines.speaker: Doris
lines.text: Hello again. Did you make your stew?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't been able to make any stew that Dave likes yet.

lines.speaker: Doris
lines.text: Oh, he's terribly hard to please, isn't he? I never know how to make food evil enough for him, I just have to try different things and see what he likes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you taste this stew please?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: That stew doesn't have any spices in it at all! That can't be right!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you taste this stew please?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: That's nothing like the stew I tasted. All the spices are wrong.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you taste this stew please?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Hmm... I think you've got the amount of one spice right, but the others are wrong.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you taste this stew please?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: You've got the amount of two of the spices right, but two of them are wrong.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you taste this stew please?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: That stew is pretty evil! But I think one of the spices is still a bit wrong.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you taste this stew please?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: TOTALLY EVIL! That's EXACTLY how the stew tasted!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't eat it all!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Now I just have to go back in time and give it to your earlier self!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: What? Why can't I eat it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You've already eaten it! This is the stew that you remember tasting in the first place!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: So confused...

sections.title: Trying to drink the right stew yourself

lines.speaker: Doris
lines.text: Hello dearie. Did Dave like the stew you gave him?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. I'm just about to go back in time to give it to him in the first place.

lines.speaker: Doris
lines.text: Have a nice time then.

lines.speaker: Doris
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I use your spices for making stew?

lines.speaker: Doris
lines.text: You can if you can find them. Dave's hell-rats stole them all!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better go and kill some hell-rats then.

sections.title: Using a spicy stew on Dave before confirming what stew is correct

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: You should make sure that's the correct recipe first.

sections.title: Using the wrong spicy spew on Dave

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Woah, what happened?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've just saved you from a buffet worse than death!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Hey, this is pretty evil stew!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. Now it's very important you remember what the stew tasted like!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Because... it just is!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Good work adventurer, I've teleported them away to safety! You only have [X] council member[s] left to protect!
